publishedAbstract: A Ceph OSD fails to start and enters a CrashLoopBackOff or fails its startup probe. The OSD logs show the following error sequence: ~~~ debug 2026-06-10T10:12:21.144+0000 9f2f7jf37750 0 bluestore(/var/lib/ceph/osd/ceph-2) NCB::__restore_allocator::No Valid allocation info on disk (empty file) debug 2026-06-10T10:12:21.144+0000 9f2f7jf37750 0 bluestore(/var/lib/ceph/osd/ceph-2)_init_alloc::NCB::restore_allocator() failed! Run Full Recovery from ONodes (might take a while)... ~~~ The cluster may report Reduced data availability: X pgs down if the affected OSDs are required for peering.
publishedTitle: Ceph OSD fails to start with "bluestore::NCB::__restore_allocator::No Valid allocation info on disk (empty file)"
